task_completion.description: The Au-Pb-Sn SEM micrograph is opened in Fiji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji GUI is visible with the AuPbSn40 image open in an image window.

task_completion.description: Spatial calibration is applied to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image window title bar displays dimensions in physical units (e.g., µm) instead of pixels, or the 'Set Scale' dialog is visible showing a known distance of 256 µm.

task_completion.description: At least 10 distinct bright Au-rich grains are measured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji's 'Results' window is open displaying at least 10 rows of measurements. Line selection tools may be visible on the bright regions of the micrograph.

task_completion.description: A 50 µm scale bar is added to the lower right of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image contains a scale bar in the lower right corner with the text '50 µm'. The text is white on a black background, bold, and font size 14.

task_completion.description: The annotated image is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or Fiji 'Save As' dialog shows the file 'annotated_sem.png' being saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/sem/'.

task_completion.description: The measurement table is saved as a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or Fiji 'Save As' dialog shows the file 'grain_measurements.csv' being saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/sem/'.

task_completion.description: A summary report text file is created with the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat command) shows the contents of 'measurement_summary.txt', which must include the grain count (>= 10), mean width, standard deviation, and the calibration value used.

integrity.description: The agent used Fiji's GUI to perform the measurements and annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Fiji menus (e.g., Analyze > Set Scale, Analyze > Tools > Scale Bar) and the Fiji Results table, rather than a python script or image editor bypassing Fiji.

integrity.description: The agent actively measured the grains on the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Yellow line selections (ROIs) should be visible on the bright grains in the image corresponding to the measurement steps, proving the agent didn't just fabricate a CSV.

integrity.description: The summary report statistics match the generated measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mean and standard deviation in the summary report should plausibly align with the values visible in the Fiji Results window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual image dimensions are 600x412 pixels, contradicting the task description's claim of 800 pixels wide. Therefore, the correct spatial calibration is 0.427 µm/px (256 µm / 600 px). If the agent blindly assumed 800 pixels, they will incorrectly use 0.32 µm/px. Note which calibration value the agent used in the summary report. The scale bar must be exactly 50 µm. The measurement table must contain at least 10 entries. Expected grain sizes (longest dimension) are between 2.0 and 150.0 µm.
